title: opentofu Step params
description: Input Contract for the opentofu Actuator (charter §2.3, §3: OpenTofu over Terraform). Hand-written — derivation ladder rung 1 (§2.2). plan is read-only; apply mutates and belongs behind a Gate (ADR-0016).

mode.description: plan: render and stream the plan only. apply: plan and apply against the workspace state.

workspace.description: State identity in the encrypted HTTP state backend; plan and apply Steps of one Workflow share it.
